content.en:
The years passed, and ten realms passed.

At this time, all the ten ancestral realms of the Dark Soul Domain were born, and they were divided one by one.

Among them, the Destruction Holy Clan occupies an Ancestral Realm, the Dark Holy Gate occupies an Ancestral Realm, and the Battle Gate occupies half of the Ancestral Realm.

Ye Tian occupies an ancestral realm in the name of the human race, and the battle gate does not have a quota for this ancestral realm, so it can continue to occupy it, and there is no way for other forces to disagree.

Therefore, the battle gate only snatched another half of the ancestral realm.

For the Battle Gate, half of the Ancestral Realm is enough, and no matter how much it is, there is no need.

The major forces have occupied some territory in the Dark Soul Domain, causing the Dark Soul Domain to gradually calm down.

At the very least, the Ancestors retreated one by one, absorbing and refining the resources obtained from the Primordial Ancestral Realm and the Ancestral Realm.

Maybe after a long time, their strength can be improved again.

For example, some ordinary ancestors who are very close to the elite ancestors may be able to break the shackles and be promoted to the elite ancestors, and the top elite ancestors such as the Boundary Ancestor may also have the hope of breaking the shackles and being promoted to the top ancestor combat power.

Of course, this is less likely.

However, Ye Tian had already broken through to the top Ancestor Combat Power with the help of ten realm years, refining countless Silent Destruction Treasures.

This is an ontological breakthrough, and therefore a real breakthrough.

Even in any place in the Dark Forbidden Realm, you can exert the combat power of the top Ancestors, and you are not afraid to destroy the Ancestors and the Holy Ancestors.

"The Dark Soul Realm is finally calm!"

Ye Tian muttered.

In the past ten realms, the Dark Soul Domain has been very chaotic, only the Terran region is very calm, but the fighting in other places has hardly stopped.

Now, the Dark Soul Domain is much better, almost equivalent to the situation of the Dark Soul Domain, local battles cannot be avoided, but the overall situation is calm.

Moreover, the Dark Soul Domain also imitated the practices of the Dark Sacred Domain, building a large number of giant cities, and using them to manage countless cultivators.

But this is not the case with the regions of the Dark Destruction Domain, who are frantically transforming and cultivating a large number of races, fighting each other like raising Gu.

After all, many races in the Dark Destruction Domain have grown up through killing and destruction, but when they reach the level of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, the Invincible Domain Ancestor, the Superior Domain Ancestor, and the Ancestor, they are almost the same as cultivators, they only improve their strength through cultivation, and Destruction can hardly improve their strength.

The Three Thousand Evil Clans plus the Destruction Holy Clan are just ordinary clansmen who absorb the power of destruction to improve their cultivation by destroying one realm and one powerful world after another.

Because of cultivating Gu in an area of dark destruction, with the recovery speed of the Dark Soul Domain and the birth speed of resources, it is possible to cultivate a large number of strong people above the Domain Ancestor and the Supreme Domain Ancestor.

This is also the goal of the ancestors of the Dark Destruction Domain to occupy the Dark Soul Domain, in fact, they also want to occupy the Dark Sacred Domain, but the Dark Sacred Domain has now become a monolith, and the Destruction Ancestor has no way to invade the Dark Sacred Domain, so he can only occasionally launch an invasion war, raise Gu by killing, sacrifice most of the domain ancestors, and focus on cultivating strong people above the strongest domain ancestors.

The ancestors of the Dark Sanctuary also knew the cultivation path of the Dark Destruction Domain, so they did not interfere, after all, the ancestors of the Dark Sanctuary could also sharpen themselves through fighting.

Ye Tian couldn't control the area occupied by the Dark Destruction Domain, and the other party also blocked that area, and it would not affect other areas for the time being, which was enough.

"The main body has been promoted to the top ancestor combat power, and then you can return to the Xuanxu Saint Realm and raise the Xuanxu Saint Realm to the Ancestral Realm!"

Ye Tian decided.

As for Xiao Yue and the others, they still stayed in the Huaxia Ancestral Realm.

Xiao Yue and the others have been contemplating the Ancestor Method, and with their comprehension qualifications, it will take about a hundred realm years before they can hope to completely integrate the Ancestor Law and be promoted to the Ancestor.

This speed is not slow, after all, the other non-superior domain ancestors have obtained the Ancestor Law, and it will take at least a few hundred realm years to hope for a breakthrough.

And the ancestral method fused by Xiao Yue and the others is still the top ancestral method, and it is more difficult to fuse, so it is very good to have such a speed.

Wow!

Ye Tian left the Huaxia Ancestral Realm and was sensed by the incarnations of the other ancestors, but they didn't care.

With a single thought, Ye Tian crossed a long distance, traveled through time and space, and came to the Xuanxu Holy Realm.

If there is no superior domain ancestor, without the help of the ancestor, if you want to fly, it will take tens of millions of years to fly to the Xuanxu Saint Realm at the earliest, which is so exaggerated, because the distance is really too long.

If it was the speed of the invincible domain ancestor, I am afraid that if I flew to endless years, I would not be able to cross such a long distance.

Therefore, in the Dark Forbidden Domain, except for the Ancestors, other Superior Domain Ancestors could not cross too long a distance.

The Dark Soul Domain is relatively close to the Dark Destruction Domain, but the Dark Soul Domain is too far away.

The birth of the Dark Sanctuary is random, so no one knows where it will be born, and it is also possible that one day a Dark Sanctuary will be born not far from the Dark Soul Domain.

Xuanxu Holy Realm.

Ye Tian came back, and he copied his own body as soon as possible.

In this way, the Xuanxu Saint Realm will have two top Ancestor combat powers, once the Xuanxu Saint Realm is promoted to the Xuanxu Ancestor Realm, even if the Destruction Ancestor and the Holy Ancestor are coming, he can block them, so that they cannot explore the Xuanxu Ancestor Realm.

"Let the Xuanxu Saint Realm be promoted!"

Ye Tian no longer suppressed the origin of the Xuanxu Saint Realm, and under the urging of the Creation Mixed Yuan Jing, the Xuanxu Saint Realm finally began to promote.

Bang!!!!!

The volume of the Xuanxu Holy Realm began to skyrocket, doubling in size with every breath.

The birth of an endless territory completely shocked the human race.

As a result, one after another, the ancestors of the Domain, who had no superiors, asked about the situation.

"Lord of the Ten Thousand Laws, what's wrong with the Xuanxu Holy Realm?"

In the face of these domain ancestors' inquiries, Ye Tian replied in unison: "The Xuanxu Saint Realm is about to be promoted to the Xuanxu Ancestor Realm!"

"What, the Xuanxu Saint Realm is about to be promoted to the Xuanxu Ancestral Realm? So, our human race will have two ancestral realms???"

The countless domain ancestors of the human race were shocked, and immediately they were ecstatic!

Once the Xuanxu Saint Realm is born into the Ancestral Realm, how many rare resources will be born!

Maybe there will be more of the Terran's superior domain ancestors, and the strength of the Terran will skyrocket.

And the large number of Invincible Domain Ancestors knew this information, and they were even more excited, and they also had the hope of being promoted to Peerless Domain Ancestors.

Thundered!!!!

The Xuanxu Holy Realm is constantly colliding, and with the situation of the Xuanxu Holy Realm, it can evolve into the Ancestral Realm in about millions of years.

At the same time, the entire Dao Mountain Realm was also affected by the promotion of the Xuanxu Saint Realm, and it also began to transform, and the area of the Dao Mountain Realm continued to devour the Dark Forbidden Domain, and the territory expanded wildly.

This time, the Dao Mountain Realm was not as large as the Evolution Dark Holy Land, but it was at least equivalent to a small Dark Holy Land.
